---
title: "Methods Figures"
author: "Gavin McNicol"
date: "2026-07-01"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

load map libraries

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(ggspatial)      # for basemap
library(patchwork)
library(prettymapr)

```

Site coords

```{r}
coords <- tibble(
  site = c(
    "Wd-1",
    "Wd-2",
    "Pr-1",
    "Pr-2",
    "Wt-1",
    "Wt-2"
  ),
  lat = c(
    41.8944391,
    41.8942260,
    41.8938255,
    41.8948141,
    41.8942857,
    41.8934611
  ),
  lon = c(
    -89.3792934,
    -89.3769692,
    -89.3757784,
    -89.3770264,
    -89.3780569,
    -89.3773216
  )
)
```

```{r}
write_csv(coords, "2022-site-coords.csv")
```
